target.writeBoundary: implemented after explicit user approval; source scope limited to SMART-51 Factory GetConfig display; no Set/save/load/other-feature expansion

candidateMatches.anchor: P51ITEM_XSTARTPOS = 0; OnClick_btnGetConfig reads section values and writes pi->id values to controls
candidateMatches.whyItMightMatch: SMART-51 printer-body parameter index 000 is already defined as P51ITEM_XSTARTPOS and read by the SMART-51 GetConfig flow.
candidateMatches.whyItMightNotMatch: The existing index 000 item is X Start Position, not a new label named test. The requested read-only test display must avoid changing existing X Start Position semantics.

candidateMatches.anchor: IDD_DIALOG_SUB contains repeated static labels named Test with IDC_EDIT1..IDC_EDIT14
candidateMatches.whyItMightMatch: The literal label Test already appears in a generic dialog resource.
candidateMatches.whyItMightNotMatch: This appears generic/test-dialog-like and is not anchored to SMART-51 GetConfig or index 000.

recommendedCandidate.reason: The only direct index 000 SMART-51 anchor found is in SubDlg51SMART.cpp as P51ITEM_XSTARTPOS = 0 and it is read during the SMART-51 GetConfig flow.
recommendedCandidate.implementationShape: separate read-only display field updated by GetConfig, not a normal m_Items parameter entry
recommendedCandidate.whyNotNormalParameterItem: Normal m_Items entries are used by SetConfig and save/load/report paths. The user explicitly excluded Set and save/load behavior.

expectedFilesCandidate.reason: Read-only GetConfig display update should be attached to the SMART-51 printer-body GetConfig flow.
A new UI control member or helper declaration may be needed if implemented.
A label/edit control for test may be needed in the SMART-51 printer-body dialog.
New control ids may be needed for the label/edit control.

forbiddenOrAvoidedFilesAndFlows.reason: The user confirmed no Set behavior.
The user confirmed save/load and other features are excluded.
Adding test as a normal parameter item would likely include it in Set and save/load/report loops.
No main routing change is needed for a SMART-51 printer-body read-only display.

readOnlyEvidence.meaning: Index 000 exists in SMART-51 printer-body parameter definitions.

readOnlyEvidence.anchor: SubDlg51SMART.cpp: P51ITEM_ADDING_INIT2(... P51ITEM_XSTARTPOS, IDC_EDIT_XPOS, ..., L"X Start Position" ...)
readOnlyEvidence.meaning: Index 000 currently maps to the existing X Start Position control.
GetConfig reads section values and writes parameter values to controls by item id.
Normal m_Items entries are persisted, so a read-only excluded field should avoid that path.

remainingAfterImplementation: Real SMART-51 hardware GetConfig validation passed by user confirmation.
Temporary CardPrinterConfig source changes were reverted by user request.
Version/release note update was intentionally not performed because the user requested no unrelated changes.
If UI positioning needs visual adjustment, it requires a separate approval.
